title: Kenyan Vegetable Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Kenyan-inspired vegetable stir fry made with tender vegetables and a hint of spice.

ingredients.name: Kenyan Vegetable Mix (or a mix of bell peppers, carrots, and onions)

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the Kenyan Vegetable Mix and stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Add the Piquant Sauce and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
